privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Calligra Words document containing finding aid text for the Susan B. Anthony Papers. Independent analysis of the setup_task.sh script confirmed the document path, expected section headings, table headers, and body alignment samples all precisely match the task metadata. However, the exact subject terms embedded in the document text are 'African Americans--Civil rights' and 'New York (State)--History', explicitly contradicting the truncated metadata claims of 'African Americans' and 'New York'.
